stemHtml: Thunderstorms can occur on a warm front if the…

options.a: cold air is moist and the environmental lapse rate exceeds the saturated adiabatic lapse rate.
options.b: warm air is moist and the environmental lapse rate is less than the saturated adiabatic lapse rate.
options.c: cold air is moist and the environmental lapse rate is less than the dry adiabatic lapse rate.
options.d: warm air is moist and the environmental lapse rate exceeds the saturated adiabatic lapse rate.
